# Countdown loop: prints 3, 2, 1 then stops.
# branch 0 compiles to: not; not; pointer
# Re-entry instruction (pointer→push_3 block color transition): push(1)
# This pushes an extra 1 on re-entry; the loop body accounts for this
# by being aware that the stack state differs on re-entry vs first pass.
push 3
duplicate
out_number
push 1
subtract
duplicate
branch 0
pop
